action.reasoning: Observation: Two-stage training improved bal_acc to 0.5421 (from 0.5129), few-shot to 0.265, many-shot 0.777, val_acc~0.544. Stage1 plateaus ~0.51, stage2 adds ~0.03. Iter time ~5min, 2.65h and 24 iters left. Analysis: Decoupled cRT helps LT but prior stage2 likely reused low-LR optimizer from stage1 (suboptimal for head); no label smoothing; can refine with dedicated high-LR SGD for classifier, cosine per stage, mild label smoothing. ResNet50+pretrain+RandAug+Focal stable. Decision: Rewrite train.py with clean separated optimizers (AdamW stage1 lr=5e-4, SGD stage2 lr=0.1+momentum for linear head), 40ep s1 + 30ep s2 (total < prior, follows >20ep rule via immediate eval), label_smoothing=0.1 in CE, proper freezing/best-saving. Run then submit_eval for expected bal_acc gain to ~0.56+.
